name: Rich Chocolate Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, oil, eggs, vanilla extract, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Mix well.
Stir in cherry pie filling, chocolate chips, and chopped nuts.
Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-cup bundt pan.
Bake for about 1 hour.
Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
When completely cool, frost with your favorite chocolate icing and sprinkle with additional chocolate chips.
